gettingStarted.title: Welcome to Disk Kit!
gettingStarted.content: Disk Kit helps you manage your files efficiently with powerful tools for organizing, converting, and cleaning up your storage.

gettingStarted.title: Quick Tools
gettingStarted.content: Add tools to your Quick Tools list from the 'All Tools' page. These will appear in the sidebar and dashboard for fast access.

gettingStarted.title: Navigation
gettingStarted.content: Use the sidebar to navigate between Dashboard, Browse Files, and all available tools. Click the menu button to collapse the sidebar.

tools.title: Batch Rename
tools.content: Rename multiple files at once using patterns. Great for organizing photo collections or downloaded files.

tools.title: Format Converter
tools.content: Convert files between different formats. Supports images (JPG, PNG, WebP), videos, audio, and documents.

tools.title: Compress Files
tools.content: Create ZIP, RAR, or 7z archives to save space. Perfect for backing up projects or sending files.

tools.title: System Cleanup
tools.content: Remove temporary files, cache, and duplicates to free up disk space and improve performance.

tips.title: Pro Tip: Use Themes
tips.content: Toggle between light and dark mode using the theme button in the header. Your preference is saved automatically.

tips.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
tips.content: Use your browser's built-in shortcuts for navigation and search while using Disk Kit.

tips.title: Organize Downloads
tips.content: Enable 'Smart Organize' to automatically sort downloaded files into folders by type (images, documents, videos, etc.).

tips.title: Save Space
tips.content: Use the 'Large Files' tool to find files over 100MB. The 'Duplicate Finder' can free up significant space by removing copies.
